items.caption: A table titled "experiment" with a caption that reads "boltium sample: 50 atoms, separate into 4 different isotopes (types of bolts)." the table is divided into four columns, each representing a different type of bolt: "isotope," "isotope count (number of bolts of each type)," "total mass (g)," and "average mass (g)." the "isotope" column lists the types of bolts, which are "isotope," "isotope count," "total mass," and "average mass." the "isotope count" column indicates the number of bolts of each type, with "isotope count" being the number of bolts of each type. the "total mass" column shows the total mass of each type of bolt, and the "average mass" column displays the average mass of each type of bolt. the table is set against a white background with black text, and there are red arrows pointing to the "isotope count" and "average mass" columns, suggesting a focus on these columns.
